# Sentinel Security Report
**Score: 72/100**
## Findings
### Critical
- [CRED-001] Hardcoded API key in .env file
- [CRED-002] AWS secret key found in config.json
### Warning
- [PERM-001] Overly broad shell.execute permission
- [PERM-002] Unrestricted network access in manifest
- [DEP-001] Known vulnerable dependency: lodash@4.17.15
### Info
- [HYG-001] No .gitignore found in workspace root
